title: Yuki's Sleepy Stars
synopsis: When little Yuki feels too excited to sleep, the gentle stars help her discover how to feel calm and cozy for bedtime.

pages.text: Yuki bounced on her soft bed. She felt wiggly and giggly inside. "I don't feel sleepy!" she said to her teddy bear.

illustration.description: A little girl with straight black hair with a red headband, light skin, almond-shaped dark brown eyes bouncing on a cozy bed with purple blankets, holding a brown teddy bear, with soft watercolor style and dreamy purple and blue gradients
illustration.alt: Yuki bouncing on her bed with her teddy bear

pages.text: Mama tucked Yuki in gently. "Your body feels excited," Mama said. "Let's help it feel calm and sleepy instead."

illustration.description: A mother tucking in a little girl with straight black hair with a red headband, light skin, almond-shaped dark brown eyes under soft purple blankets, gentle moonlight streaming through a window with glowing stars and ethereal atmosphere

pages.text: Yuki looked out her window. Tiny stars twinkled like sleepy friends. "The stars look so peaceful," she whispered.

illustration.description: A little girl with straight black hair with a red headband, light skin, almond-shaped dark brown eyes looking out a bedroom window at glowing stars in dreamy purple and blue gradients with floating clouds and soft watercolor style
illustration.alt: Yuki looking at stars through her window

pages.text: "Let's breathe like the stars," Mama said softly. "In... and out... slow and gentle." Yuki took big, sleepy breaths.

illustration.description: A mother and little girl with straight black hair with a red headband, light skin, almond-shaped dark brown eyes sitting together breathing calmly, surrounded by floating clouds and glowing stars with round sleepy faces in pastel palette
illustration.alt: Yuki and Mama breathing together peacefully

pages.text: Yuki's wiggly feeling began to melt away. Her body felt warm and heavy, like a sleepy star floating in soft clouds.

illustration.description: A little girl with straight black hair with a red headband, light skin, almond-shaped dark brown eyes lying peacefully in bed surrounded by dreamy floating clouds, glowing stars with round sleepy faces, and gentle moonlight in ethereal atmosphere
illustration.alt: Yuki feeling calm and sleepy in bed

pages.text: "I feel calm now," Yuki yawned. The stars seemed to smile as her eyes grew heavy. "Goodnight, sleepy stars."

illustration.description: A little girl with straight black hair with a red headband, light skin, almond-shaped dark brown eyes peacefully sleeping in bed with glowing stars with round sleepy faces watching over her, soft watercolor style with dreamy purple and blue gradients
illustration.alt: Yuki sleeping peacefully under the stars

metadata.illustrationStyle: soft watercolor, dreamy purple and blue gradients, glowing stars, round sleepy faces, floating clouds, gentle moonlight, ethereal atmosphere, pastel palette

questions.question: How did Yuki feel at the beginning of the story?
questions.explanation: Yuki felt excited and wiggly, which made it hard for her to fall asleep.

questions.question: What did Mama teach Yuki to do?
questions.explanation: Mama taught Yuki to breathe slowly and gently, like the peaceful stars.

questions.question: What did the stars look like to Yuki?
questions.explanation: Yuki thought the twinkling stars looked like peaceful, sleepy friends.

questions.question: How did Yuki feel at the end?
questions.explanation: After breathing with Mama and watching the stars, Yuki felt calm and ready for sleep.
